title: Gaveno Cavailia Luxurious HUDSON Bed Set with Duvet Cover and Pillow Cases, Polyester-Cotton, Grey, Double
features: A simple way to give your bedroom a completely new look with our Contemporary Living Up to Date Style. Smooth, Comfortable and highly durable.
Comfortable and super soft linen for your bedroom. Sumptuous living: a step towards luxury, delicacy and your desired softness.
Material: " 50% Cotton, 50% Polyester." - Washing Instructions: Washable at 40 °C. Do not Dry clean. Do not bleach
Drying & Ironing Instructions: Tumble dry at low temperature. Iron at low temperature. Maximum sole-plate temperature is 110 °C. Steam ironing may be a risk.
1 X Double Size Duvet Cover ( 200 Cm x 200 Cm ) + 2 Pillow Case ( 50 x 75 Cm )
